description: Evaluates change management service maturity—service governance, change management system and process, KPIs/KRIs, policies by change type, CAB governance, impact analysis, baselines and deviation detection, exception handling, and service restoration.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: A change management service exists, is scoped appropriately, and is reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy.

capabilities.name: Change management system and process
capabilities.description: Change management software and a formalized enterprise-wide process generate and govern change requests with automated approvals, staging and risk integrations, and quarterly review.
evaluation_focus: Formalized and documented change management process
Integration with staging and risk management

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Change management KPIs and KRIs—including change failure rate, unauthorized change detection, and restoration time—are documented and reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Change failure and unauthorized change metrics
Service restoration time after failed changes

capabilities.name: Change management policies by type
capabilities.description: Formal change management policies for subject, network, endpoint, application, and data or database changes apply enterprise-wide and are reviewed at least quarterly.

capabilities.name: Change advisory board (CAB)
capabilities.description: A change advisory board approves and denies change requests with enterprise-wide representation.

capabilities.name: Impact analysis and quality testing
capabilities.description: Impact analysis is mandated for major changes, supported by documented procedures, and automatable in CI/CD.
evaluation_focus: Impact analysis mandated for major changes

capabilities.name: Change baselines and deviation detection
capabilities.description: Change management baselines exist for all change request types, are monitored and reviewed at least quarterly, and deviations are identified automatically across the enterprise by the SOC or visibility solution.
evaluation_focus: Baselines for all change request types

capabilities.name: Exception management
capabilities.description: An exception management process handles changes that cannot undergo standard impact analysis, deployed enterprise-wide including cloud, with post-exception review.
evaluation_focus: Exception process for changes without impact analysis

capabilities.name: Restoration of business critical services
capabilities.description: The enterprise can restore services after failed changes via documented processes, automation, controller integration, and quarterly review.

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
